name: Patter
desc: Open-source voice-AI SDK. The Vapi/Retell alternative for builders who want to own the stack. Give your AI agent a phone number in 4 lines — Python and TypeScr…
descFull: Open-source voice-AI SDK. The Vapi/Retell alternative for builders who want to own the stack. Give your AI agent a phone number in 4 lines — Python and TypeScript, MIT licensed, Twilio, Telnyx, and Plivo.
